news.summary: Futures markets scaled back losses following comments from President Trump hinting that a decision on an Iran attack may not be immediate. This development caused Dow Jones Futures to reduce their losses as investors awaited further developments.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures cut losses as Trump delays Iran decision, hinting at no imminent attack.

news.summary: Neuronetics, Inc., a medical technology company trading as STIM on NASDAQ, based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, recently disclosed the issuance of inducement awards to a single new non-executive employee. These awards, greenlit by Neuronetics' Compensation Committee, were implemented as a significant incentive for the individuals to join the company. The vesting of these awards is contingent upon the employees remaining in service with Neuronetics until the designated vesting date. The allocation of these awards aligns with the regulations stipulated in the Company's 2020 Inducement Incentive Plan.
news.headline: Neuronetics granted inducement awards to one new non-executive employee under Nasdaq rule, subject to vesting terms.

news.summary: After being passed by the US Senate on Tuesday, the GENIUS Act has now been added to the platform's betting market for users to engage with. This move follows the legislation receiving approval with a majority vote in the Senate.
news.headline: Polymarket predicts 89% chance of GENIUS Act passing as US Senate approves, launches betting market.

news.summary: In Detroit on June 19, 2025, Foxxtecca is breaking barriers by partnering with professional motorcycle drag racer Dystany Spurlock, set to become the second Black woman to compete in the NHRA Pro Stock Motorcycle class. Spurlock will make her debut during the Juneteenth weekend from June 20 to 22 at her home track.
news.headline: Dystany Spurlock to make NHRA history as the second Black woman in Pro Stock Motorcycle class with Foxxtecca's support.

news.summary: In Houston on June 19, 2025, the HomeSafe Alliance announced the termination of the Global Household Goods Contract by the U.S. Department of Defense's Transportation Command. This contract, secured by HomeSafe in 2021 to revolutionize the military move system, was cut short with a notice received on June 18, 2025.
news.headline: HomeSafe Alliance loses Global Household Goods Contract from TRANSCOM on June 18, 2025. Contract won in 2021.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025, in Houston, a prominent U.S. refining company, Flint Hills Resources, adopted Inatech's Techoil SaaS system to streamline its crude trade and supply operations. Prior to this, Flint Hills had relied on a series of in-house software solutions for managing different aspects of its processes. This move signifies a shift towards modernizing the company's approach to handling its operations, reflecting a growing trend in the industry. This initiative will impact how Flint Hills manages its core functions related to crude oil trading and supply management, and it marks a significant step towards improved efficiency and effectiveness within the organization.
news.headline: Flint Hills Resources implements Inatech's Techoil SaaS system in 2025 to modernize crude trade processes.

news.summary: In Anchorage, Alaska, on June 19, 2025, CYBER Express Wash, a rapidly growing competitor in the car wash sector valued at over $15 billion, launched its flagship facility. This innovative establishment introduced a customer-centric approach that revolutionizes contemporary car maintenance, prioritizing hospitality and cutting-edge services.
news.headline: CYBER Express Wash launched in Anchorage, Alaska, aiming to revolutionize the $15B+ car wash industry with a unique model.

news.summary: Exciting news out of San Diego as ICW Group Insurance Companies has revealed the introduction of ICW Specialty, a fresh branch under VerTerra Insurance, an Excess and Surplus lines insurer of ICW Group. In order to facilitate this expansion, Tracey Estes is set to assume the role of Chief at ICW Group. This development marks a significant step forward for the company as it aims to capitalize on the opportunities presented within the specialty insurance sector.
news.headline: ICW Group Insurance launches new unit, ICW Specialty, under VerTerra Insurance, with Tracey Estes as Chief.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on June 19, 2025, the Tampa Bay Soccer Hall of Fame (TBSHOF) introduced its first set of inductees. The prestigious group includes 11 individuals ranging from athletes and coaches to referees and media personalities, each recognized for their significant contributions to the soccer community in the Tampa Bay area. The inaugural class is a diverse and accomplished selection that pays tribute to the rich history and impact of the sport in the region.
news.headline: Tampa Bay Soccer Hall of Fame introduces first class of 11 inductees, including athletes, coaches, refs, and media figures.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025, Belo Sun Mining Corp. shared that Ms. Ayesha Hira is stepping down as Interim President & CEO on July 4, 2025. She will stay during the transition to the new leadership team, to be revealed soon. Ms. Hira chose not to seek re-election as a director at the upcoming shareholder meeting. The Board expressed gratitude for her commitment and contributions as Interim President & CEO and a Board member. Belo Sun is listed as (TSX: BSX, OTCRB: BSXGF).
news.headline: Belo Sun Mining Corp. announces Interim President & CEO to step down on July 4, 2025. New leadership team to be announced. Ms. Hira not standing for re-election as director.

news.summary: As banks continue to integrate structured Bitcoin yield products into their wealth management services, the partnership represents a significant move in this trend. This collaboration highlights the growing popularity of incorporating BTC investment options into traditional banking offerings. The increasing number of banks incorporating these products underscores a shift towards digital assets in the financial sector, emphasizing the importance of catering to the evolving needs of clients in the modern market landscape.
news.headline: XBTO and Arab Bank Switzerland collaborate on BTC yield product for institutions, reflecting a growing trend in banks offering structured BTC yield products.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the number of jobless claims in the United States surged to 965,000 last week, marking a significant increase and underscoring the ongoing economic challenges caused by the pandemic. This number surpassed the expectations of analysts, who had predicted a figure closer to 800,000 claims. The rise in jobless claims reflects the strain felt by many businesses and industries as they navigate restrictions and closures. Moreover, the report also revealed that continuing claims, which track individuals receiving unemployment benefits, climbed to 5.3 million. These figures indicate the prolonged impact of the pandemic on the labor market and the pressing need for economic support and recovery efforts.
news.headline: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov allowed to leave France temporarily, as per reports.

news.summary: The treatment market for HER2-low cancer is expected to undergo a major shift with the approval of ENHERTU and the progression of various novel antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) such as DATROWAY, TRODELVY, ifinatamab deruxtecan, BB-1701, and Disitamab vedotin. These ADCs are set to revolutionize the market landscape, with significant developments expected in the near future. As a result, industry experts anticipate a rapid transformation in the HER2-low cancer treatment sector, with promising advancements on the horizon that could greatly impact current treatment protocols.
news.headline: HER2-low Cancers Market to grow by 9.4% (2020-2034) with ENHERTU & other ADCs driving transformation.

news.summary: The bank-to-bank transfer conducted through the SWIFT system was highly symbolic for the country, demonstrating its efforts to rejoin the global financial community. This transaction marked a significant milestone as the war-torn nation progresses towards financial normalization.
news.headline: Syria shows progress in ending isolation with bank transfer using SWIFT system, signaling global reintegration.
Is UK spending enough on defense? Concerns rise as military budget at £40 billion falls short of requirements.

news.summary: Today, on June 19, 2025, Dundee Corporation (TSX: DC.A) shared positive news about the outcomes of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders. During the meeting, shareholders showed their support by voting in favor of all agenda items presented. This includes a significant number of votes affirming their approval, indicating a strong consensus among shareholders. The meeting was held earlier in the day and the positive voting results demonstrate a unified stance among participants.
news.headline: Dundee Corp. (TSX: DC.A) announces positive voting results from 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on June 19, 2025, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (OTCQX: OCANF) has revealed plans for a share consolidation. The consolidation will involve combining three (3) pre-consolidation common shares into one (1) post-consolidation common share for shareholders of the Company.
news.headline: OceanaGold to consolidate shares, 3:1 ratio for pre to post-consolidation common shares. U.S. listing proposed.

news.summary: The market for therapies targeting delta-like ligand 3 is experiencing substantial growth due to the increasing prevalence of small cell lung cancer (SCLC) and neuroendocrine tumors. Progress in antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) technology and a rise in clinical trial participation are driving the market forward. This growth is indicative of a market with considerable potential, with the current estimated value reaching significant numbers, reflecting the demand for innovative treatments in this space.
news.headline: Delta-like Ligand 3 therapies market to surge from 2025 to 2034 due to cancer prevalence, ADC tech advancements.

news.summary: A media market event in Costa Rica is set to occur from June 24 to 25 in San José, featuring more than 500 business meetings. The event will gather buyers, producers, and experts from 19 countries. The Costa Rica Film Commission, PROCOMER, and the Ministry of Culture and Youth are the organizing entities. Additionally, the program will encompass tours and other activities as part of the event.
news.headline: Costa Rica hosts Costa Rica Media Market on June 24-25, with 500+ meetings involving 19 countries, boosting audiovisual industry.

news.summary: On June 9, 2025, PolyPid Ltd. announced significant findings from the SHIELD II Phase 3 trial of D-PLEX100 during a conference call. The trial focused on preventing surgical site infections in abdominal colorectal surgery patients with large incisions. The results of the trial were highly successful, indicating promising outcomes for the use of D-PLEX100.
news.headline: PolyPid Ltd. shares successful SHIELD II Phase 3 trial results of D-PLEX100 in preventing SSIs in abdominal surgery patients.

news.summary: The upgraded system boasts several improvements including an extended flight time, with an increase to XX hours, and a higher payload capacity, now able to carry up to XXX pounds. Its stability has been enhanced for smoother operation, and features advanced radar technology for improved navigation. Furthermore, the system's cleaning durability has been enhanced for increased longevity.
news.headline: Duke Robotics introduces ICDS2 drone with longer flight time, bigger payload, advanced radar, and improved durability.

news.summary: On June 10, 2025, Tilray Brands, Inc. revealed the approval of a proposal to amend the Company’s Fifth Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation to execute a reverse stock split of the Company’s common stock. This decision came at a special stockholder meeting where the vote passed successfully. The reverse stock split will be implemented at a ratio falling between 1-to-10 and 1-to-20. However, Tilray has opted to hold off on executing the reverse stock split for now. The company is taking this pause to consider different timing options and assess the stock price before finalizing the reverse split. Tilray, a leading global lifestyle and consumer packaged goods company operating in the beverage, cannabis, and wellness sectors, is traded on both Nasdaq (TLRY) and TSX (TLRY).
news.headline: Tilray Brands' stockholders approve reverse stock split at ratio of 1-to-10 to 1-to-20 during special meeting, implementation paused for evaluation.

news.summary: On June 11, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Sappi Ltd. (JSE: SAP; OTCQX: SPPJY), a prominent global provider of materials from woodfibre-based resources, now trades on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees regulated trading markets for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Sappi Ltd. transitioned to the OTCQX from the Pink® market.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Sappi Ltd. to OTCQX, a leading global provider of materials, trading on the OTCQX Best Market.

news.summary: Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed on June 11, 2025, that its FDA-cleared ART100 system from the company has ignited a surge of interest in commercialization. The pioneering company, listed as NASDAQ: IINN, specializing in life-support and diagnostic technologies, sees this as a crucial step forward in their commercial endeavors. The growing adoption of the ART100 system marks a pivotal moment for the company, with numbers indicating a significant boost in their commercial validation efforts.
news.headline: Inspira's ART100 system in use at top U.S. hospitals, driving sales with FDA clearance, marking major milestone.

news.summary: After a successful clinical trial by PolyPid, the PESG has released a new briefing highlighting their achievement. The trial demonstrated a groundbreaking 58% reduction in surgical site infections. This remarkable result positions PolyPid's D-PLEX100 as a potential new standard of care in the medical field. The significant reduction in infections showcases the potential of D-PLEX100 to revolutionize post-surgery recovery and improve patient outcomes.
news.headline: PESG reports PolyPid's D-PLEX100 Phase 3 trial shows 58% reduction in surgical site infections, potential new standard of care.

news.summary: PESG has released a recent update after PolyPid's clinical achievement, where they observed a groundbreaking 58% decrease in Surgical Site Infections. This places PolyPid's D-PLEX100 at the forefront as a potential upcoming standard of care in the medical field. The remarkable development signifies a significant advancement with promising implications for future medical practices.
news.headline: PolyPid's SHIELD II trial sees a 58% decrease in surgical site infections, potentially setting D-PLEX100 as the new standard of care.

news.summary: In Cincinnati, Ohio, a biotechnology company named Onconetix, Inc. (NASDAQ: ONCO) has received approval from its stockholders for a 1-for-85 reverse stock split at its Special Meeting held on May 30, 2025. The Company specializes in developing solutions for men’s health and oncology. The reverse split of its common stock will be effective from 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time on June 13, 2025. This decision was made by the Board of Directors of Onconetix, Inc. The Company is striving to enhance its position in the market through this strategic move.
news.headline: Onconetix, Inc. conducted 1-for-85 Reverse Stock Split post shareholders' approval at special meeting.

news.summary: In Norwalk, Connecticut on June 12, 2025, CUSIP Global Services (CGS) unveiled its CUSIP Issuance Trends Report for May 2025. This report monitors the issuance of fresh security identifiers to predict debt and capital markets movement for the upcoming quarter. It highlighted a rise in monthly requests for new corporate and municipal identifiers, indicating growing activity in the markets.
news.headline: CUSIP Global Services reports increased request volumes for new corporate and municipal security identifiers in May 2025.

news.summary: GAITHERSBURG, Md., June 12, 2025 - Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH), is a specialty pharmaceutical company dedicated to enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy. The Company has announced that a reverse stock split will take effect on June 16, 2025, at 12:01 a.m. ET. Trading of Shuttle Pharma's common stock will continue on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the current symbol "SHPH" but on a split-adjusted basis starting June 16, 2025. The new CUSIP number for the common stock post the reverse stock split will be 825693401.
news.headline: Shuttle Pharma to implement reverse stock split on June 16, 2025, at 12:01 a.m. on Nasdaq with new CUSIP number 825693401.

news.summary: The company has expanded its digital asset holdings significantly. This strategic move has increased the company's ecosystem holdings, demonstrating a commitment to diversifying its assets in the digital space. The expansion encompasses a substantial increase in the number of digital assets held by the company, highlighting a clear growth trajectory in the digital asset sector. This move signifies a strategic shift towards expanding the company's presence in the digital asset market, reflecting a forward-looking approach to investment and portfolio management.
news.headline: Dogecoin Cash, Inc. buys 420M DOG tokens and AltcoinMarketCap.com domain, expanding digital asset holdings.
PolTREG has set up Immuthera, its U.S. subsidiary to drive global growth strategy. #InternationalExpansion #Biotech
